columns.name: fkaExternalId
columns.description: Unique external identifier for the entity.

columns.name: fkaCounterpart
columns.description: The counterpart entity involved in the activity.

columns.name: fkaActivity
columns.description: The type of activity or transaction involving the counterpart.

columns.name: fkaDescription
columns.description: Additional description or notes about the entity.

columns.name: pk
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each record.

columns.name: opprettet
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was created.

columns.name: oppdatert
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last updated.
